# Credit Hackr

> Credit Hackr is an Australian-focused consumer education site about credit cards. It publishes card listings for comparison, a rewards-vs-fee calculator, long-form editorial guides, and legal pages. Content is general information only—not personal financial product advice under Australian law. Users should confirm rates, fees and eligibility with issuers before applying.

## Audience & scope

- Primary geography: Australia (products and terminology are AU-oriented).
- Topics: rewards points, Qantas/Velocity and bank programs, cashback, annual fees, travel insurance via cards, credit scores, balance transfers, supermarket loyalty stacks.

## Key URLs (relative to site origin)

- / — Home: search popular cards, navigate to directory.
- /cards — Browse and filter the card directory (names, fees, earn rates, benefits shown for comparison).
- /cards/{id} — Detail page for one card profile (educational summary; “Apply” links to the issuer).
- /hackr — “HACKR Calculator”: estimate yearly points/cashback value minus annual fee (illustrative).
- /blog — Guides index (frequent flyer, cashback vs points, insurance, credit scores, etc.).
- /blog/{slug} — Individual guide (also supports legacy numeric id URLs).
- /changelog — Product changelog mirroring repository CHANGELOG.md.
- /privacy — Privacy Policy (Australian Privacy Act / APPs framing).
- /terms — Terms of Use and limitations of service.

## Technical

- Single-page application (React); titles, descriptions, canonical URLs and JSON-LD are set client-side on navigation.
- Static files: /robots.txt, /llms.txt (this file).

## Operator

- Site credit in footer: VRTX Labs (https://vrtxlabs.tech).

## Contact

- Use footer “Support” or operator site for enquiries; do not infer private support email from this file alone.
